Values.value: customerNumber is a mandatory field. It needs to be populated.
name is a mandatory field. It needs to be populated.
address1 is a mandatory field. It needs to be populated.
city is a mandatory field. It needs to be populated.
state is a mandatory field. It needs to be populated.
zipCode is a mandatory field. It needs to be populated.
remitCode is a mandatory field. It needs to be populated.

MAP.COMMENT: Convert the string list into a string and map it to error message
